name: 凯特·圣克莱尔
name_full: 凯特·圣克莱尔 Kate St. Clair
birth_place: 美国,德克萨斯州,达拉斯
introduction: Kate is an actress and published author of YA fiction. Kate was born in Dallas, Texas, and grew up in Austin. She was accepted at age 13 to a creative writing program in Oxford, England, and afterward went to St. Stephen's boarding school. It was at school that she wrote her first series, Shift. She is the god-daughter of casting director Karen Hallford, who got her various parts throughout her life.
